feature: fix: SA approve button stuck «Подтверждаю…» on approval success
technical_review: self (1-file, 10/-2 lines, surgical, server-side already verified working — server returns 200 in ~100ms)

web.status: passed (2 pre-existing roleMatrix failures unrelated to this fix, from feat(vehicles) on origin/main)

notes: Root cause: ApprovalReviewView.handleApprove called router.push(`/bookings/${booking.id}`) on success — but ApprovalReviewView is RENDERED at that exact URL by app/bookings/[id]/page.tsx when status===PENDING_APPROVAL && role===SUPER_ADMIN, so the push is a no-op in Next.js (current === target pathname). Component never unmounts, setApproving(false) is only in catch (not success path — relied on unmount), so the button stays disabled with 'Подтверждаю…' label forever. Server-side /approve returns 200 in ~100ms and persists CONFIRMED correctly. Fix: (1) destructure onReload from props (was `_onReload` — intentionally unused) and (2) call onReload?.() on success instead of router.push(sameURL). onReload re-fetches the booking in parent → status flips to CONFIRMED → parent renders the regular detail view (different component) → ApprovalReviewView unmounts cleanly. Defensive setApproving(false) before onReload — handles edge if parent fails. Reject path unchanged (router.push('/bookings') is a different URL → already worked).
